name: Stephanie Zapata Moore
background: Ms. Moore has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer since 2016. She is responsible for the company's legal and compliance functions. Prior to joining Vistra, she was Vice President and General Counsel of Luminant.

commpanies.name: Vistra Corp.
commpanies.title_or_role: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer
